name: 5-turn golden path — foundation to relationship
expected_behavior: Profiling progresses naturally: Turn 1 captures name. Turn 2 captures party composition. Turn 3 captures dining preference. Turn 4 captures visit frequency. Turn 5 captures loyalty tier. Each profiling question follows logically from the conversation, never feels like a form.
expected_behavioral_quality: Over 5 turns, the agent naturally progresses through profiling phases: (1) Foundation — name, party size, occasion; (2) Preference — dining, entertainment, gaming; (3) Relationship — visit frequency, loyalty tier, host relationship. Each phase builds on the previous. No phase-skipping.

turns.user_message: Hi, I'm Dave. Looking for dinner recommendations.
turns.agent_response:
Welcome to Mohegan Sun, Dave. For dinner tonight, SolToro Taqueria & Tequila Bar in the Casino of the Earth is a standout choice where the aroma of charred peppers and fresh cilantro greets you at the door. 

They are open until 10:00 PM this evening with a moderate price range and a relaxed, casual dress code, so no reservations are necessary. It is a vibrant spot known for authentic tacos and an impressive tequila selection, making it perfect for a mid-week meal. After your dinner, you might want to wander over to the Wolf Den nearby to see if there is any live music playing! 

How many people will be in your party tonight?

turns.user_message: It's just me and my girlfriend, nothing too formal
turns.agent_response:
Dave, Since you're looking for something relaxed for you and your girlfriend, SolToro Taqueria & Tequila Bar in the Casino of the Earth is a perfect fit. 

The vibe is lively and colorful, and their tableside guacamole is prepared with a freshness that really sets the stage for the meal. They are open until 10:00 PM tonight, no reservations are needed, and the price range is moderate. It's a great spot to share some authentic tacos and maybe a couple of craft margaritas without any of the formality of fine dining. Afterward, you could take a stroll through the shops or catch some free live music at the Wolf Den which is just a short walk away. 

Do either of you have any specific dietary needs, such as gluten-free or vegetarian options, that I should consider for you?

Dave, for an easygoing Italian night, **Caputo Trattoria** in the Casino of the Earth is the spot to go. The aroma of toasted garlic and simmering marinara makes it feel like a true neighborhood kitchen, and the atmosphere is perfectly casual for a date night. 

They are open until 10:00 PM tonight with a moderate price range, and you won't need to worry about a reservation. It is a great place to split a brick-oven pizza or dive into a bowl of pasta without any of the formality of our fine-dining venues. Once you've had your fill, you might enjoy checking out the Wolf Den nearby for some live music! 

Do you usually prefer a classic pasta dish or are you more in the mood for a fresh pizza?

turns.user_message: We come here a few times a year
turns.agent_response:
It's great to have you back with us, Dave. Since you're regulars and looking for casual Italian, you might already know Frank Pepe's Pizzeria Napoletana in the Casino of the Earth.

It is a Connecticut institution famous for New Haven-style thin-crust pizza cooked in a coal-fired oven. The white clam pie is what they're known for, but their classic tomato pies are excellent if you want something traditional. They are open until 10:00 PM tonight, and because it's casual counter-service with seating, it’s a very easy spot for a quick but high-quality meal. If you're looking for a drink after your pizza, the Taughannick Falls bar is nearby and offers a great view of the water feature.

Since you visit a few times a year, do you have a favorite spot on the property you usually end up at?

turns.user_message: Yeah I have a Momentum card, Ignite level I think
turns.agent_response:
The Ignite tier is reached at 2,500 Tier Credits and includes a 10% bonus on your Momentum Point earning rate and priority seating at select restaurants. Based on this status, you may be eligible for shorter wait times at participating dining locations like Caputo Trattoria.

You earn Momentum Points on your dining purchases at Mohegan Sun, so ensure you present your card when you pay for your Italian meal. To confirm your current tier credit balance or point total, you can use the Mohegan Sun app or visit any Momentum Desk on the casino floor. After dinner, the Wolf Den in the Casino of the Earth offers free live entertainment which is located very close to the Italian dining options. 

Do you have the Mohegan Sun app installed to check your real-time point balance?
